project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Re-commenced milling late yesterday afternoon. Depth of 2482ft reached, then POOH and currently flowing the well for the next ~12 hours. At some point Slb will change out their wireline unit modules, but they might want to mill more before doing so. Latest lookahead has 9th July for MFC log, but TBC.
